This document only uses the **Example Theme** for demonstration—because the Example Theme is built with **Nuxt**, the Nuxt build and deployment steps described here are "customized for this theme". Before actual deployment, please prioritize reading the deployment instructions and requirements provided by the **theme author**.
55a4117b: GitHub Pages only supports static sites, and Nuxt will pre-render your application into static HTML files.
